prompt_redacted: Can I switch from an ARM to a fixed rate?
output_redacted: FHA loans offer accessible financing for first-time homebuyers. The minimum down payment is 3.5% for borrowers with credit scores of 580 or higher. Borrowers with scores between 500-579 may still qualify with a 10% down payment. The property must be your primary residence and meet FHA condition standards. I recommend speaking with one of our licensed mortgage officers for personalized guidance.
